ck_mq_address_registry_block_ranges.name: ck_mq_address_registry_block_ranges
ck_mq_address_registry_block_ranges.value:
("mq_address_registry"."valid_from_block" is null or "mq_address_registry"."valid_from_block" > 0)
        and ("mq_address_registry"."valid_to_block" is null or "mq_address_registry"."valid_to_block" > 0)
        and ("mq_address_registry"."first_seen_block" is null or "mq_address_registry"."first_seen_block" > 0)
        and ("mq_address_registry"."last_seen_block" is null or "mq_address_registry"."last_seen_block" > 0)
        and ("mq_address_registry"."valid_from_block" is null or "mq_address_registry"."valid_to_block" is null or "mq_address_registry"."valid_to_block" >= "mq_address_registry"."valid_from_block")
        and ("mq_address_registry"."first_seen_block" is null or "mq_address_registry"."last_seen_block" is null or "mq_address_registry"."last_seen_block" >= "mq_address_registry"."first_seen_block")

ck_mq_chain_aliases_approved_mapping.name: ck_mq_chain_aliases_approved_mapping
ck_mq_chain_aliases_approved_mapping.value: "mq_chain_aliases"."status" <> 'approved' or ("mq_chain_aliases"."chain_network_id" is not null and "mq_chain_aliases"."namespace_id" is not null and "mq_chain_aliases"."address_codec_id" is not null)

ck_mq_chain_aliases_pending_unmapped.name: ck_mq_chain_aliases_pending_unmapped
ck_mq_chain_aliases_pending_unmapped.value: "mq_chain_aliases"."status" not in ('pending_mapping', 'pending_network') or ("mq_chain_aliases"."chain_network_id" is null and "mq_chain_aliases"."namespace_id" is null and "mq_chain_aliases"."address_codec_id" is null)

ck_mq_chain_aliases_approval_metadata.name: ck_mq_chain_aliases_approval_metadata
ck_mq_chain_aliases_approval_metadata.value: "mq_chain_aliases"."status" in ('pending_mapping', 'pending_network') or ("mq_chain_aliases"."approved_by" is not null and "mq_chain_aliases"."approved_at" is not null)

ck_mq_chain_capabilities_mqnode_evidence.name: ck_mq_chain_capabilities_mqnode_evidence
ck_mq_chain_capabilities_mqnode_evidence.value: "mq_chain_capabilities"."mqnode_parser_status" not in ('test_ready', 'production_ready') or "mq_chain_capabilities"."mqnode_integration_test_ref" is not null

ck_mq_chain_capabilities_metric_evidence.name: ck_mq_chain_capabilities_metric_evidence
ck_mq_chain_capabilities_metric_evidence.value: "mq_chain_capabilities"."metric_status" not in ('test_ready', 'production_ready') or "mq_chain_capabilities"."metric_integration_test_ref" is not null

ck_mq_kv_builds_parent_shape.name: ck_mq_kv_builds_parent_shape
ck_mq_kv_builds_parent_shape.value: ("mq_kv_builds"."build_kind" = 'base' and "mq_kv_builds"."base_build_id" is null and "mq_kv_builds"."delta_parent_build_id" is null) or ("mq_kv_builds"."build_kind" = 'delta' and (("mq_kv_builds"."base_build_id" is not null)::int + ("mq_kv_builds"."delta_parent_build_id" is not null)::int) = 1)

uq_mq_kv_filter_manifest_namespace.name: uq_mq_kv_filter_manifest_namespace
uq_mq_kv_filter_manifest_namespace.where: "mq_kv_filter_manifest"."namespace_id" is not null and "mq_kv_filter_manifest"."metric_group_id" is null

uq_mq_kv_filter_manifest_metric.name: uq_mq_kv_filter_manifest_metric
uq_mq_kv_filter_manifest_metric.where: "mq_kv_filter_manifest"."metric_group_id" is not null and "mq_kv_filter_manifest"."namespace_id" is null

ck_mq_kv_filter_manifest_counts.name: ck_mq_kv_filter_manifest_counts
ck_mq_kv_filter_manifest_counts.value: "mq_kv_filter_manifest"."item_count" >= 0 and "mq_kv_filter_manifest"."false_positive_target_ppm" between 1 and 1000000 and ("mq_kv_filter_manifest"."observed_false_positive_ppm" is null or "mq_kv_filter_manifest"."observed_false_positive_ppm" between 0 and 1000000)
